reviews.comment:
Esta estación está hace muchísimos años en la villa, antes estaba sola por muchos km. Buena atención como siempre en el ACA. Es un punto de referencia para indicar donde queda algo en la villa. Enfrente la dirección de turismo (atiende gente joven que tiene mucho para aprender).

(Translated by Google)
This station has been in the village for many years; before, it was alone for many miles. As always, the ACA is excellent service. It's a reference point for indicating where something is in the village. It's across from the tourist office (it serves young people who have a lot to learn).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCd3FTNXB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. El restaurant es bueno y no es caro. Hacen una buena trucha

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The restaurant is good and reasonably priced. They make excellent trout.
